name: Bean Threads with Minced Pork
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Bean threads or Chinese noodles
3 Green onions, sliced into 1-inch pieces (reserve some for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bean threads and dried mushrooms in separate bowls. Cover each with hot water. Let stand for 30 minutes; drain.
2. Squeeze out excess water from the mushrooms and discard stems. Slice caps thinly.
3. Cut chili pepper in half and remove seeds. Finely mince the chili pepper.
4. Thinly slice 2 green onions using a knife or mandoline.
5. In a small bowl, combine ginger and hot bean sauce.
6. In a medium bowl, mix chicken broth, soy sauce, and sherry.
7. Heat peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
8. Add minced pork (or chicken) to the pan and stir-fry until no longer pink, about 2 minutes.
9. Add mince chili pepper, sliced green onions, and ginger-bean sauce mixture. Stir-fry until meat absorbs color from the bean sauce, about 1 minute.
10. Add the chicken broth mixture, drained bean threads, and mushrooms to the pan. Simmer, uncovered, until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 5 minutes.
11. Garnish with reserved green onion slivers and cilantro sprigs.
Makes 4 servings.
